member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.GlobalMealsController.GetGlobalMealsAsync(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves global meals by name or description
member.returns: A response with global meals list
member.response: Returns the global meals list
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.GlobalMealsController.GetGlobalMealAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves a Global Meal by Global Meal GUID
member.returns: A response with a global meal
member.response: Returns the global meal list
If meal is not exists
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.GetPartiesAsync(System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves parties the user is invited to or hosting.
member.param: Whether or not to include: Party invites, settings, or choices
member.returns: A response with the parties the user is invited to or is hosting
member.response: Returns the parties list
If the request is bad
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.GetPartySettingsAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves party settings. Only the host of a party or an invitee can call this endpoint.
member.returns: A response with the party settings list
member.response: Returns the party settings list
If the request is bad
If you are not involved with the party, either as the host or as an invitee
If the party does not exist
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.GetPartyInvitesAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves party invites. Only the host of a party or an invitee can call this endpoint.
member.returns: A response with party settings list
member.response: Returns the party invites list
If the request is bad
If you are not involved with the party, either as the host or as an invitee
If the party does not exist
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.GetPartyAsync(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Retrieves a party by PartyID. Only the host of a party or an invitee can call this endpoint.
member.param: Whether or not to include: Party invites, settings, or choices
member.returns: A response with a party
member.response: Returns the party
If you are not involved with the party, either as the host or as an invitee
If the party does not exist
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.PostPartyAsync(DinderDLL.Requests.PostPartyRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new party.
member.returns: A response with the new meal
member.response: A successful response
For a bad request
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.PutPartySettingAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,DinderDLL.Requests.PutPartySettingRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing party setting. Only the host of the party can update a setting.
member.returns: A response with the updated party setting
member.response: If the party setting was updated successfully
For bad request
If you are not the host of the party
If the party or the setting does not exist
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.PutPartyAsync(System.Int32,DinderDLL.Requests.PutPartyRequest,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Updates an existing party. Only the host of the party can update a party.
member.param: Whether or not to include: Party invites, settings, meals or choices
member.returns: A response as update party result
member.response: If the party was updated successfully
For bad request
If you are not the host of the party
If the party does not exist
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.DeletePartyAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes an existing party. Only the host of the party can delete a party.
member.returns: A response as delete party result
member.response: If the party was deleted successfully
For a bad request
If you are not the host of the party
If the party does not exist
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.PutPartyInviteAsync(System.Int32,System.Guid,DinderDLL.Requests.PutPartyInviteRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing party invite. You can only update your own party invites.
member.returns: A response as update party result
member.response: If party invite was updated successfully
For a bad request
If the updated invite is not your invite
If the party or the party invite is not found.
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.DeletePartyInviteAsync(System.Int32,System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes an existing Party Invite. Only the host can delete a party invite.
member.returns: A response with no data
member.response: If the party invite was deleted successfully
For a bad request
If you are not the host of the party
If the party or the party invite is not found.
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.PutPartyChoiceAsync(System.Int32,System.Guid,System.Int32,DinderDLL.Requests.PutPartyChoiceRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing party choice. You can only update your own party choices and the meal must have been selected for the party.
member.returns: A response as update party result
member.response: If the party choice was updated successfully
For a bad request
If this is not your choice or the meal is not selected for the party.
If the party or the party choice is not found.
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.PostPartyChoiceAsync(System.Int32,System.Guid,DinderDLL.Requests.PostPartyChoiceRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new party choice. You can only make choices in parties you are invited to, and only on meals which exist in the party.
member.returns: A response with new meal
member.response: A response as creation of party
For a bad request
If this is not your choice or the meal is not selected for the party.
If the party or the party choice is not found.
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.GetPartyChoicesAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves party choices. You can only see all choices if you are the host. If you are not the host, only your choices will be returned.
member.returns: A response with party choices list
member.response: Returns the party choices list
For a bad request
If you are not the host or an invitee.
If the party is not found.
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.PostPartyInviteAsync(System.Int32,DinderDLL.Requests.PostPartyInviteRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new party invite. Only the host can create party invites.
member.returns: A response with new meal
member.response: A response with the party invite created
For bad request
If you are not the host of the party.
If the party is not found.
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.GetPartyMealsAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves party meals. You can only retrieve the party meals if you are the host, or an invitee.
member.returns: A response with party settings list
member.response: Returns the stock items list
For bad request
If you are not the host of the party or an invitee.
If the party is not found.
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.PostPartyMealAsync(System.Int32,DinderDLL.Requests.PostPartyMealRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new party meal. Only the host can create a party meal.
member.returns: A response with new meal
member.response: A response with the successfully created party meal
For bad request
If you are not the host of the party.
If the party is not found.
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.DeletePartyMealAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes an existing Party Meal. Only the host can delete a party meal.
member.returns: A response as delete party result
member.response: If meal was deleted successfully
For bad request
If you are not the host of the party.
If the party is not found.
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.RootController.GetVersions
member.summary: Retrieves API versions
member.returns: Returns links to different versions
member.response: Returns the api versions available
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.RootController.GetVersion1Endpoints
member.summary: Retrieves v1 Nodes
member.returns: Returns links to different nodes
member.response: Returns the stock items list
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.TokenController.GetTokenAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves auth token. Uses basic authentication.
member.returns: A response with a bearer token
member.response: Returns the bearer token and expiration
For a bad request
If app install ID does not exist
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.UsersController.GetUsersAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Searches users
member.returns: A response with user list
member.response: Returns the user list
For bad request
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.UsersController.GetUserFriendsAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves user friends. You can only retrieve your own friends.
member.returns: A response with your friends list.
member.response: Returns your friends list
For bad request
If you are trying to access someone else's friends list.
If the user is not found.
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.UsersController.GetUserPartiesAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves user Parties. You can only retrieve your own parties.
member.returns: A response your party list
member.response: Returns your party list
For bad request
If you are trying to access someone else's party list.
If the user is not found.
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.UsersController.GetUserAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves a user by Guid.
member.returns: A response with a user
member.response: Returns the user
If the user is not found.
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.UsersController.PutUsersAsync(System.Guid,DinderDLL.Requests.PutUserRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing user. You can only update your own user.
member.returns: A response as update user result
member.response: If the user was updated successfully
For a bad request
If you try to update a user other than your own.
If the user is not found.
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.UsersController.DeleteUserAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes an existing user. You can only delete your own user.
member.returns: A successful delete response
member.response: If user was deleted successfully
For a bad request
If you tried to delete another user
If the user is not found.
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.UsersController.PostUserFriendAsync(System.Guid,DinderDLL.Requests.PostUserFriendRequest)
member.summary: Creates a user friend. You can only create your own user friends.
member.returns: A response with the user friend you created
member.response: If user friend was created successfully
For a bad request
If you tried to add a friend to another user
If the user is not found.
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.UsersController.PutUserFriendAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,DinderDLL.Requests.PutUserFriendRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing user friend. You can only update your own user friends.
member.returns: A response as update user result
member.response: If user was updated successfully
For bad request
If you try to edit another user's friends.
If the user or the user friend is not found.
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.UsersController.GetUserMealsAsync(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Retrieves user meals. You can only retrieve your own meals.
member.param: Whether or not they have made it before (optional)
member.returns: A response your meals that match the filters
member.response: Returns the user meals list
For a bad request
If you try to acces another user's meals.
If the user is not found.
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.UsersController.GetUserMealAsync(System.Guid,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a meal by MealID. You can only retrieve your own meals.
member.returns: A response with a meal
member.response: Returns the meal
For a bad request
If you try to retrieve a meal which is not yours
If the user or the meal does not exist
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.UsersController.PostUserMealAsync(System.Guid,DinderDLL.Requests.PostUserMealRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new meal. You can only create your own meals. Global Link and Private notes are optional.
member.returns: A response with your new meal
member.response: Returns the meal
For bad request
If you try to create a meal on behalf of another user, or you already have a meal named that.
If the user was not found
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.UsersController.DeleteUserMealAsync(System.Guid,System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes an existing meal. You can only delete your own meals.
member.returns: A successful delete response
member.response: If the meal was deleted successfully
For a bad request
If you try to delete another user's meals.
If the user or the meal were not found.
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.UsersController.PutUserMealsAsync(System.Guid,System.Int32,DinderDLL.Requests.PutUserMealRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing meal. You can only update your own meals.
member.returns: A successful response to updating your meal.
member.response: If meal was updated successfully
For a bad request
If you try to update someone else's meal
If the user or the meal is not found
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Queries.DapperQueries.GetUsersAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Gets all users according to filters
